name: onslaught-career-editor-workspace
description: WinUI-first workspace for the Onslaught Toolkit with archived Electron/Python/WPF reference apps.

scripts.check:quick: npm run test:validation-inventory && npm run test:docsync && npm run test:doc-commands && npm run test:md-links:public-core && npm run test:generated-output-safety && npm run test:winui-primary-lane && npm run test:rebuild
scripts.test:validation-inventory: py -3 tools\validation_inventory_test.py && py -3 tools\validation_profiles_test.py && py -3 tools\validation_inventory.py --check
scripts.test:rebuild: npm run test:rebuild-core && npm run test:rebuild-client && npm run test:rebuild-cmsh-static-preview && npm run test:rebuild-godot-toolchain && npm run test:rebuild-godot-smoke-validation && npm run test:rebuild-local-assets

scripts.test:winui-original-binary-joined-sessio: npm run test:winui-original-binary-online-session-directory-smoke && npm run test:winui-original-binary-wsl-remote-client-smoke && py -3 tools\build_winui_original_binary_joined_session_same_host_runtime_authority_bundle.py && py -3 tools\winui_safe_copy_online_joined_session_same_host_runtime_authority_check_test.py && py -3 tools\winui_safe_copy_online_joined_session_same_host_runtime_authority_check.py --self-test && py -3 tools\winui_safe_copy_online_joined_session_same_host_runtime_authority_check.py --check
scripts.test:runtime-tooling-safety: npm run test:runtime-profile-helper-safety && npm run test:runtime-cdb-helper-safety && npm run test:runtime-input-helper-safety && npm run test:winui-safe-copy-live-runtime-smoke-helper && py -3 tools\cdb_exit_event_cleanup_test.py
scripts.test:winui-patch-engine-safety: dotnet test .\OnslaughtCareerEditor.AppCore.Tests\OnslaughtCareerEditor.AppCore.Tests.csproj --nologo --filter "FullyQualifiedName~BinaryPatchCatalogContractTests|FullyQualifiedName~SafeCopyProfileCatalogContractTests" && dotnet test .\OnslaughtCareerEditor.UiTests\OnslaughtCareerEditor.UiTests.csproj --nologo --filter "FullyQualifiedName~BinaryPatchRegressionTests" && py -3 tools\legacy_patch_script_safety_test.py && npm run test:winui-patch-catalog-accounting
scripts.archive:electron:dev: concurrently -k -n ui,electron -c cyan,amber "npm run archive:electron:dev:ui" "wait-on tcp:3000 && npm run archive:electron:run"
scripts.archive:electron:build: npm --workspace @onslaught/contracts run build && npm --workspace @onslaught/electron run build && npm --workspace @onslaught/cli run build && npm --workspace @onslaught/ui run build
scripts.archive:electron:build:main: npm --workspace @onslaught/contracts run build && npm --workspace @onslaught/electron run build
scripts.archive:electron:typecheck: npm --workspace @onslaught/contracts run build && npm --workspace @onslaught/contracts run typecheck && npm --workspace @onslaught/electron run build && npm --workspace @onslaught/electron run typecheck && npm --workspace @onslaught/cli run typecheck && npm --workspace @onslaught/ui run typecheck
scripts.archive:electron:test:parity: npm run archive:electron:build:main && npm --workspace @onslaught/electron run test:parity
scripts.archive:electron:test:cli-smoke: npm run archive:electron:build && npm --workspace @onslaught/cli run test:smoke
scripts.test:doc-commands: py -3 tools\npm_script_doc_check_test.py && py -3 tools\npm_script_doc_check.py --scope active && py -3 tools\public_package_doc_command_check.py --self-test && py -3 tools\public_package_doc_command_check.py
scripts.test:doc-commands-all: py -3 tools\npm_script_doc_check_test.py && py -3 tools\npm_script_doc_check.py --scope all && py -3 tools\public_package_doc_command_check.py --self-test && py -3 tools\public_package_doc_command_check.py
scripts.test:generated-output-safety: py -3 tools\safe_generated_output.py --self-test && py -3 tools\export_video_manifest.py --self-test && py -3 tools\export_asset_catalog.py --self-test && dotnet run --project .\tools\BeaAssetExportHarness\BeaAssetExportHarness.csproj -- --self-test-output-safety
scripts.test:public-allowlist: py -3 tools\public_allowlist_safety_check.py --self-test && py -3 tools\public_allowlist_safety_check.py --include-submodules && npm run test:public-primary-migration-inventory
scripts.test:repo-hygiene: py -3 tools\repo_text_hygiene_check_test.py && py -3 tools\repo_text_hygiene_check.py && py -3 tools\repo_line_endings_check_test.py && py -3 tools\repo_line_endings_check.py
scripts.test:winui-zip-package-probe: py -3 tools\winui_lore_pack_builder.py --self-test && py -3 tools\winui_zip_package_probe_test.py && py -3 tools\winui_zip_package_probe.py --check --include-media-smoke
scripts.test:winui-zip-release-candidate-probe: py -3 tools\winui_lore_pack_builder.py --self-test && py -3 tools\winui_zip_package_probe_test.py && py -3 tools\winui_zip_package_probe.py --check --include-media-smoke --out-root subagents\winui-zip-release-candidate-probe\current --package-name OnslaughtToolkit-winui-v1.0.9-win-x64.zip
scripts.test:battleengine-m2-m3-scaffolds: npm run test:battleengine-camera-look-measurement && npm run test:battleengine-energy-scaffold && npm run test:battleengine-shield-scaffold && npm run test:battleengine-fire-cooldown-scaffold && npm run test:battleengine-projectile-speed-scaffold && npm run test:battleengine-coast-friction-measurement && npm run test:battleengine-scalar-contract-regression
